title: midnight-craving dutch tomato bake
description: a rich and creamy dutch-inspired dish perfect for satisfying your midnight cravings, featuring datterini tomatoes and a beurre monte sauce. this recipe is a low-calorie friendly twist on the classic dutch tomato bake.
instructions: in a blender or food processor, combine the beurre monte, low-fat milk, and a pinch of salt and pepper. blend until smooth.
in a large skillet, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
add the flour and whisk to combine. cook for 1 minute, or until lightly golden.
add the datterini tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they begin to release their juices.
add the beurre monte mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
stir in the nutritional yeast and cook for an additional minute.
transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with chopped parsley.
bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the mixture is heated through.
